text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After classes, I'm on my way to the training track when I see a familiar
Umamusume accompanied by an unfamiliar one.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Uwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That building contains both the musical department and home ec
classrooms. Beyond that is the indoor pool.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hokkaido was big, but I've never seen a school this huge before! I'm
sure I'll get lost at least once... no, maybe five times...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Aren't you Team Sirius's trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Hello there. It's nice to know you've heard of me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A trainer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Right. In order to run in the Twinkle Series, you must belong to a team
run by a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This trainer manages Team Sirius, which has produced many G1 race
winners.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: S-so you're like some kinda master! Hello! I'm Special Week!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't call myself that... But anyway, what are you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You see, I just transferred here from Hokkaido. Suzuka was giving me
a tour of the campus.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But getting here's not enough to start running races, huh? I didn't
realize I'd have to get accepted to a team too...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I wanna join Suzuka's team! That way I can watch her
racin' up close and personal!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... You have to be scouted to join a team. There's no guarantee
you'll get into the team you want...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Scouted?! Just like a supermodel! Then I'll just have to try
super-duper hard!
choice_data_list: Well, you've got energy on your side, at least.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I think we should get going.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Okay, see you around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After dominating in her debut race, Silence Suzuka finished in eighth
at the Yayoi Sho... I would love to ask her what happened, but...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That's not my place.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That's not my place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, I stop by the tryouts to scope out potential talent.
While there, I recognize someone in the audience.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you here to watch the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you here to watch the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're the trainer from Team Sirius. That's right, I'm here to watch
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise this is. She just transferred, so I didn't expect to see
her on the roster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New students usually learn the basics of running and racing before
determining the right time for them to tryout.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sounds like she really wants to be on your team.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sounds like she really wants to be on your team.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It certainly seems that way... But she also has a dream of her own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She wants to run in the Twinkle Series and become the best racer in
all of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've only just met her, but I can already tell that Special Week faces
her dreams, her emotions... everything head on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, something in Silence Suzuka's expression looks...
almost sad. I marvel at how different her face is now compared to her
debut.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You sound almost jealous there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I, well...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the third race of today's tryouts. Each racer has taken
their place in the gate.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... It's starting.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes number six, Special Week! She makes up for her late start
with an early spurt as she enters the third corner.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's closing in! Closer! Closer... she's taken the lead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Special Week! She just might—

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
For a new transfer, she's got guts! I can't even tell she's new. And that
expression...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
For a new transfer, she's got guts! I can't even tell she's new. And that
expression...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not just her expression... Her running form itself seems to embody her
dreams of coming to Tokyo and becoming the best in Japan.
However...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's this? Special Week has stopped in her tracks and is now
waving at someone!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did it, Suzukaaa! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh! Sounds like she thinks she crossed the finish line! Now the rest
of the pack is passing her in quick succession!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll be training with you from now on—the name's Special Week!
Thank you for the opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! We got a new member?! Special Week, can I call you Spe?!
Nice to meetcha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I was hoping to get into Suzuka's team, but well, I
kinda messed up in the tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But when Team Sirius' trainer scouted me, I remembered hearing your
team was really great too, so I happily accepted!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohooo... So we're not good enough to be your first choice, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-no, it's not like that! Although Suzuka's team definitely was my first choice!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well, tough toenails, 'cause you're stuck with us now! We'll turn you into the most miserable racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! The hell you waitin' for?! If you wanna be the best in Japan,
you better start runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her skills still need refining, but her earnest desire to be the best has
really made an impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I realize now that I want to help Special Week achieve her dreams.
